creator: dhorn2000@gmail.com
text:
Now that the pkg rebuild for open-vm-tools has completed for 140releng-amd64, this issue is no longer reproducible for me on FreeBSD 14 Beta1 amd64 as of 13-Sep-2023 @ 7AM EST.  Looks like 140releng package run has not been started for aarch64 or armv7 yet as of this morning. https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/

Feel free to close this unless there is a creative way of doing kernel ABI versioning to have the package automatically detect out of sync state. (Source at time of build vs execution time)
